title: salix × capnoides
intro: Salix × capnoides, also known as glandular willow, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Salix alba and Salix fragilis species. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its high salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Salix × capnoides include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve blood circulation, and support the immune system. Salix × capnoides is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve for topical application, and is used in herbal medicine to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
